headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (May 22-28): Verrica, Bristol-Myers Squibb FDA Decisions, Medtronic Earnings, Conference Presentations & More
summary: Biotech stocks advanced in the week ending May 22, defying the broader market retreat. The defensive nature of the industry and stock-specific moves lent support.

headline: Noted Tesla, Apple Analyst Says Consumer Electronics Demand 'Disappearing, Not Deferred,' Sees Further Stock Downside
summary:
Shanghai, the business capital of China, is slowly beginning to reopen following citywide lockdowns due to a spike in COVID cases. Businesses have restarted production and civilians are now allowed to move out of their apartment complexes with time restrictions.

An analyst, however, cautions the effects of the COVID resurgence will linger for a while longer.

headline: 'Doctor Strange' Outpaces 'Downton Abbey' To Control Box Office Dominance
summary: The Marvel Cinematic Universe maintained its domination of the U.S. box office this weekend as the Walt Disney Co.’s (NYSE: DIS) “Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness” grossed $30 million from 4,534 theaters for its third week in theatrical release.

headline: DOGE Is Now Among Top 10 Purchased Coins by BNB Whales
summary:
According to WhaleStats, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has emerged among the top 10 digital currencies that the largest BNB whales are buying. 

BNB whales hold a $27,439,092 worth of DOGE, which is 1.94 percent of their comprised portfolio.
